articles.author: BY URI SELA
articles.title: Drama at Shufersal: Former CEO sues the chain for millions
articles.description: Uri Watermann is suing Shufersal for about NIS 5.8M. According to his claims, the controlling shareholders thwarted his retirement grant, while they themselves scooped up bonuses worth millions.
articles.content: An upheaval in Israel's largest retail chain: Uri Watermann, the former CEO of Shufersal, has filed a massive lawsuit totaling NIS 5,799,299 against the company in the Tel Aviv Regional Labour Court.… [+6362 chars]

articles.title: Chinese AI models raise ‘sleeper agent’ fears after report finds more vulnerable code for US users
articles.description: Booz Allen report warns Chinese AI models like DeepSeek and Qwen may produce more vulnerable code for U.S. government users, raising concerns.
articles.content: Chinese AI models used to write code may be creating a hidden security risk for U.S. companies, federal officials and government contractors, per a new report published by a major defense contractor … [+9643 chars]
